items.title: I spent some time with new Blazers head coach Micah Nori at Summer League and talked to him about his plans for Scoot Henderson, how he'll manage rotations and how the Blazers' play style could differ from what he did in Minnesota.
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt:
I spent some time with new Blazers head coach Micah Nori at Summer League and talked to him about his plans for Scoot Henderson, how he'll manage rotations and how the Blazers' play style could differ from what he did in Minnesota.

Story: www.rosegardenreport.com/micah-nori-t...
